response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong alignment with the Staff Software Engineer role, particularly in distributed systems, AI-driven development, and technical strategy. His experience at Naver (AI-agent infrastructure) and Tencent (high-throughput systems) directly addresses core responsibilities, while his open-source contributions and diverse technical background show adaptability and ownership. Minor gaps in AI-native engineering exposure and agile leadership are outweighed by his proven ability to bridge engineering and product perspectives.
strengths: Proven expertise in distributed systems and high-throughput architectures (e.g., Tencent, Dunnhumby media).
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and code generation tools (Naver, MCP).
Strong stakeholder coordination and operational ownership across multiple roles (Staff-level at Naver/Altom, founder).
concerns: Limited explicit mention of agile leadership (e.g., scrum champion rotation) in recent roles.
No direct evidence of LLM/ML product development, though AI-native exposure is implied.
German language skills are basic, which may impact collaboration in a Berlin-based team.
